zh-CN:
修复
     - 修复了一个意外的全局变量污染
     - 修复了 v3.0.4 版本中使用了 CompletionPredictor 模块产生的新问题
       警告：CompletionPredictor 模块始终会导致 PSCompletions 出现一些意外行为,只是现在不影响正常使用
            如: 多次初始化信息，多次更新确认
en-US:
fix
     - Fix an unexpected global variable contamination
     - Fix a new issue in version 3.0.4 about the CompletionPredictor module.
       Warn: The CompletionPredictor module always causes PSCompletions to have some unexpected behaviors.But now it does not affect normal use
            e.g. multiple initialization information, multiple update confirmations

zh-CN:
修复
     - 修复了意外的初始化错误
       如: 与 CompletionPredictor 模块之间的意外冲突
          虽然修复了意外冲突导致的初始化错误
          但此模块依旧会导致 PSCompletions 的某些行为执行多次，不过不影响正常使用
            如：初始化信息，更新确认
     - 修复了一些其他问题
en-US:
fix
     - Fixed an unexpected initialization error
       For example: an unexpected conflict between the CompletionPredictor module and PSCompletions
       Although the initialization error has been fixed
       The module will still cause PSCompletions to execute some behaviors multiple times, but will not affect normal use
         e.g. initialization information, update confirmation
     - Fixed some other issues

zh-CN:
修复
     - 初始化时所使用的临时json文件名从 PSCompletion 修改为 PSCompletion + 一个随机Guid
       避免用户自己可能存在的 PSCompletion.json 文件被意外覆盖
en-US:
fix
     - The name of the temporary JSON file used for initialization: PSCompletions => PSCompletions + a random Guid
       to avoid PSCompletions.json that may exist for users being overwritten accidentally

zh-CN:
更新和修复
     - 为补全菜单 UI 添加了一个 reset 命令(<$Magenta>{{$PSCompletions.root_cmd}} ui reset<$Blue>),用于将 UI 重置为默认状态
     - 修复了 Linux 下的一个 bug
en-US:
Update and fix
     - Add a reset command(<$Magenta>{{$PSCompletions.root_cmd}} ui reset<$Blue>) for the completion menu UI, which can reset the UI to default.
     - Fix a bug in Linux

3.0.1.zh-CN: 修复 3.0.0 版本的几个小问题

zh-CN:
重要更新!
     - 新增并默认使用新的补全菜单 UI
     - 添加了许多新 UI 的配置命令
     - 修改了补全文件的目录结构
     - 修改符号: ✨ => 😄
     - 修改变量:$_psc => $PSCompletions
     - 兼容 Linux 下的 Powershell
     - 修复了一些其他问题

     <$Yellow>此版本有许多<$Red>破坏性更新<$Yellow>
     更新完成, 重启 Powershell 并导入模块后，运行加载错误警告中给出的修复命令去更新补全!
en-US:
Important update!
     - Add A new completion menu UI and use it by default.
     - Modify the file structure of the completion.
     - Add many configuration commands for the new completion menu UI.
     - Modify symbol: ✨ => 😄
     - Modify variable: $_psc => $PSCompletions
     - Compatible with Powershell on Linux.
     - Fix some other issues.

     <$Yellow>The version has many <$Red>BREAKING CHANGE<$Yellow>
     After the update is complete, restart Powershell and reimport the module.
     Run the fix command given in the load error warning to update the completions!

zh-CN:
更新
     - 新增了 $_psc.fn_write 方法(用于优化 PSCompletions 模块的命令输出)
     - 更新了一些 $_psc.fn_* 方法
     - 新增了一个子命令: order
     - 修复了一些其他问题
en-US:
Update
     - Add $_psc.fn_write method (to optimize command output from the PSCompletions module)
     - Update some $_psc.fn_* methods
     - Add an subcommand: order
     - Fix some other issues

zh-CN: - 修复了 ++ 运算符引发的排序问题
en-US: - Fix a sorting issue caused by the ++ operator

zh-CN: - 修复更新后一个意外的初始化错误
en-US: - Fix an unexpected initialization bug after updating

zh-CN:
更新
     - 正式移除前缀为 _psc_ 的全局函数以减少全局命名污染
     - 现在模块只占用一个变量名($_psc)和一个函数名(PSCompletions)
     - 将 $_psc 常量化，避免意外覆盖修改
     - 修复了一些其他问题
en-US:
Update
     - Formally remove global functions prefixed with _psc_ to reduce global naming pollution
     - Now modules only take one variable name ($_psc) and one function name (PSCompletions)
     - Make $_psc constant to avoid overwriting or modifying
     - Fix some other issues

zh-CN:
性能更新!
     - 改进了动态排序和LRU
     - 显著提高了响应速度
     - 修复了一些问题


     更新完成后，运行以下命令获取以上特性:
     👉👉👉  {{$_psc.root_cmd}} update;{{$_psc.root_cmd}} update *  👈👈👈
en-US:
performance update!
     - Improved dynamic sorting and LRUs
     - Improved response time for completions
     - Fix some issue


     After the update is completed, run the following command to get the above features!

     👉👉👉  {{$_psc.root_cmd}} update;{{$_psc.root_cmd}} update *  👈👈👈

2.2.0:
Important update!
     - Improve dynamic sorting of completion
     - Fix some issue


     After the update is completed, be sure to run the following command!

     👉👉👉  {{$_psc.root_cmd}} update;{{$_psc.root_cmd}} update *  👈👈👈
2.1.0: - Updating completions in the future will not affect existing sorting records
- Run psc config LRU <number> to set it
After the update is completed, be sure to run the following command!
